rationale.R1.2: The output provides a detailed analysis of the logical consistency of the text, identifying several overclaims and internal tensions.
rationale.RX.1: The output flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (RX.4: 3), and marks confidence and missing evidence for some recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content in the form of editorializing and tautological statements.
rationale.RX.5: The output blends sources without traceability.
